requirement_topic.en: Israel Grid-Connection Review - IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 230/400 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 以色列并网审查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 以色列併網審查——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及230/400 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Solar PV inverters for Israel projects should be treated as requiring both product conformity evidence and project-level grid-connection approval. The Israel Electricity Authority regulates electricity-sector arrangements, while utility interconnection review checks that distributed-generation equipment meets applicable grid-interface requirements. Practical inverter evidence normally includes IEC 62116 anti-islanding testing, IEC 61727 photovoltaic system grid-interface compliance, protection settings, reconnection behavior, and firmware validation for Israel's low-voltage supply of 230/400 V at 50 Hz. The current Israeli Standard references and any project-specific utility settings must be confirmed before shipment or commissioning.
summary.zh: 用于以色列项目的太阳能光伏逆变器应按同时需要产品合格证据和项目级并网批准处理。以色列电力局监管电力行业安排，公用事业并网审查会核查分布式发电设备是否满足适用的并网接口要求。逆变器实际证据通常包括IEC 62116防孤岛测试、IEC 61727光伏系统并网接口合规、保护整定、重连行为，以及针对以色列230/400 V、50 Hz低压供电的固件验证。出货或调试前必须确认现行以色列标准引用及任何项目特定公用事业参数。
summary.zht: 用於以色列項目的太陽能光伏逆變器應按同時需要產品合格證據和項目級併網批准處理。以色列電力局監管電力行業安排，公用事業併網審查會核查分散式發電設備是否滿足適用的併網介面要求。逆變器實際證據通常包括IEC 62116防孤島測試、IEC 61727光伏系統併網介面合規、保護整定、重連行為，以及針對以色列230/400 V、50 Hz低壓供電的韌體驗證。出貨或調試前必須確認現行以色列標準引用及任何項目特定公用事業參數。

standards_or_laws: Israel Electricity Authority distributed-generation and connection arrangements - confirm current applicable decision and utility procedure before project submission
IEC 62116 - Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters - Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 - Photovoltaic systems - Characteristics of the utility interface
Israel low-voltage supply basis for equipment configuration: 230/400 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power station connection, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408 for PV grid-connected inverter technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding or protection-test reports. Those documents are based on Chinese grid conditions and Chinese review processes. They do not prove compliance with Israel Electricity Authority connection conditions, utility protection settings, IEC 62116, IEC 61727, or Israel 230/400 V grid parameters.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408光伏并网逆变器技术要求，以及国内防孤岛或保护测试报告。这些文件基于中国电网条件和中国审查流程，不能证明符合以色列电力局接入条件、公用事业保护整定、IEC 62116、IEC 61727或以色列230/400 V电网参数。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408光伏併網逆變器技術要求，以及國內防孤島或保護測試報告。這些文件基於中國電網條件和中國審查流程，不能證明符合以色列電力局接入條件、公用事業保護整定、IEC 62116、IEC 61727或以色列230/400 V電網參數。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 - 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 - 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 - 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid files do not transfer to Israel grid-connection acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence for the specific inverter model, protection-setting tables, firmware version records, and a project-specific statement showing 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration. Confirm whether the utility or project engineer requires additional local witness testing, parameter locking, or approval documentation before commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T和NB/T并网文件不能转移为以色列并网接纳。出口商应为特定逆变器型号准备IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据、保护整定表、固件版本记录，以及说明230/400 V 50 Hz配置的项目专用声明。调试前应确认公用事业或项目工程师是否要求额外本地见证测试、参数锁定或批准文件。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T和NB/T併網文件不能轉移為以色列併網接納。出口商應為特定逆變器型號準備IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據、保護整定表、韌體版本記錄，以及說明230/400 V 50 Hz配置的項目專用聲明。調試前應確認公用事業或項目工程師是否要求額外本地見證測試、參數鎖定或批准文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected PV projects because connection approval and utility commissioning are project gates; exact evidence package depends on the current Israel Electricity Authority arrangement and utility procedure
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence may support China domestic review but is not accepted as Israel Electricity Authority or utility approval evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, and Israel-specific 230/400 V 50 Hz firmware settings as separate Israel grid-connection evidence. Do not present GB/T 19964, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 37408 documents as Israel Electricity Authority or utility approval. Confirm the current Electricity Authority connection arrangement and utility commissioning checklist before shipping the inverter or locking firmware parameters.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727并网接口证据及以色列专用230/400 V 50 Hz固件设置作为单独的以色列并网证据处理。不得将GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408文件作为以色列电力局或公用事业批准文件提交。出货或锁定固件参数前，请确认现行电力局接入安排和公用事业调试清单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727併網介面證據及以色列專用230/400 V 50 Hz韌體設置作為單獨的以色列併網證據處理。不得將GB/T 19964、NB/T 32004或GB/T 37408文件作為以色列電力局或公用事業批准文件提交。出貨或鎖定韌體參數前，請確認現行電力局接入安排和公用事業調試清單。
